basics.name: Kuan-Chieh Lo
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Computer Science & Engineering
basics.summary: Ph.D. student at The Ohio State University working on LLM & Agentic AI, fairness in machine learning, and LLM safety.

highlights: Research: LLM & Agentic AI, Misinformation, Fairness, LLM Safety

work.name: The Ohio State University
highlights: LLM Safety: Jailbreak Attacks on Large Reasoning Models (Under Review)

work.name: Academia Sinica
highlights: Misinformation Mitigation via Recommendation Systems (WWW 2022, WSDM 2021)

work.name: ASUSTeK Computer Inc.
highlights: Developed system firmware for ASUS products, including gaming desktops, business and consumer laptops.

publications.name: Claim Verification with Adversarial Reasoning and Planning
publications.publisher: International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM)

publications.name: FairWAG: Fairness-aware Weighted Aggregation for Graph Learning in a Federated Setting
publications.publisher: ACM Conference on Equity and Access in Algorithms, Mechanisms, and Optimization (EAAMO)

publications.name: Crisis Observatory: Extracting Credible Signals During a Crisis in the Age of LLMs
publications.publisher: IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM)

publications.name: VICTOR: An Implicit Approach to Mitigate Misinformation via Continuous Verification Reading
Learning to Rank Visual Stories From Human Ranking Data
All the Wiser: Fake News Intervention Using User Reading Preferences
publications.publisher: ACM International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining (WSDM)

projects.name: Creativity in Large Language and Vision-Language Models
projects.summary: Investigated the compositional factors influencing creative output in LLMs and vision-language models (VLMs), analyzing how individual components interact to drive creativity and exploring controllability of creative generation across modalities.

projects.name: LLM-Powered Agentic Chatbot for Bridal Consultation
projects.summary: Designed and developed a multi-agent AI system for a bridal company integrating a conversational LLM chatbot, a personalized recommender system agent, and a meeting scheduling agent into a unified pipeline.

projects.name: LLM-Assisted Legal Document Processing System for Law Firms
projects.summary: Built an NLP pipeline for law firms leveraging LLMs and RAG to automatically retrieve semantically relevant past legal cases from a document corpus and populate structured legal documents.
